title.en: Later, he also learned about the Holy Monument ...

content.en:
Holy Monument.

Ye Tian first learned about the existence of this treasure from the light-clothed saintess, which could be called the most precious opportunity in a holy realm.

Later, he also learned about the Holy Monument from the Battle Gate.

The Holy Monument is useless to the Invincible Domain Ancestor, but for the Supreme Domain Ancestor, it is a real great opportunity, which helps them condense the Holy Soul, even if they can't condense the Holy Soul, it can also make their Soul Holy Light skyrocket a lot.

Since this holy monument had not yet been fully formed, Ye Tian could not be sure how many holy monuments this holy monument contained, it could be dozens, hundreds, or even more.

Ye Tian estimated that there were about 3 million years before this holy monument could really be formed.

"3 million years is not a long time, you have to plan it carefully!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He knew very well how powerful the Holy Monument was for the Supreme Domain Ancestors, and once the news of the Holy Monument's birth spread, those Holy Lands and even the Holy Gate would be alarmed, and they might come to occupy the Holy Monument place.

At that time, the other Holy Gates would not be afraid of the Battle Gate, and they would definitely do whatever it took to obtain the Holy Monument quota!

After all, there are too few holy realms, there are few holy monuments, and the number of holy monuments is one less than one, if you occupy many holy monuments, you may be able to cultivate a few more Holy Soul-level supreme domain ancestors for your own forces, which is enough to increase the strength of your forces!

Even the Holy Gate wants a few more Holy Soul-level Supreme Domain Ancestors!

Maybe the Invincible Domain Ancestors didn't care about this matter, but those Invincible Domain Ancestors were afraid that they would fight for this opportunity for their apprentices or juniors.

Once many Invincible Domain Ancestors descended on the Xuanxu Saint Realm, Ye Tian would not be able to compete with them, could he refuse them and not give them places?

In that case, the Terrans will suffer.

So—

"Looks like we have to negotiate with the Battle Gate!"

Ye Tian muttered.

If the Battle Gate can send a group of Invincible Domain Ancestors to sit in the Xuanxu Sacred Realm in a short period of time, then there is nothing to worry about.

Moreover, he can also sell these places to the Battle Gate, and those Supreme Domain Ancestors can also get places if they want to, and they need to pay some resources and treasures.

In this way, he also made a lot of money.

-------------------

Battle Gate.

Ye Tian's copied body begged to see the Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor of the Superior Domain Ancestor.

Soon, the Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor let Ye Tian enter his mansion.

"I've seen the Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

"Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, what's the matter?"

Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor asked.

"Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor, the Xuanxu Holy Realm where I am located is about to give birth to the Holy Monument!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Oh, the Holy Monument!"

The Fire Emblem War Ancestor was somewhat interested.

Although the Holy Monument was of no use to him, it was a great opportunity for the Supreme Domain Ancestor.

If there are enough holy monuments, it is enough to have a huge impact on a holy gate and improve the backbone of the holy gate.

After all, in the case of no superior domain ancestor not making a move, the invincible domain ancestor is respected, and once the Holy Soul-level supreme domain ancestor is promoted to the invincible domain ancestor, he will inevitably become a two-step invincible domain ancestor in the future, which is why the battle gate has so many two-step invincible domain ancestors.

"Do you want some Invincible Domain Ancestors of the Battle Sect to sit in the Xuanxu Saint Realm?"

Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor saw Ye Tian's thoughts at a glance and said.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

The Fire Emblem War Ancestor pondered for a moment and said, "I can sit in the town and send some Invincible Domain Ancestors to sit in the Xuanxu Holy Realm, but you still need to pay some Holy Monument places, ten places, this is the requirement of the Battle Gate." If there are enough places for the Holy Monument, those Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Battle Gate can also pay a huge price to buy the places, and it is up to you to decide how much to sell, how about it?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian agreed.

Subsequently.

The Fire Emblem War Ancestor summoned some Invincible Domain Ancestors, informed them of the Holy Monument, and asked them to go to the Xuanxu Holy Realm.

For the orders of the Fire Emblem Ancestors, these Invincible Domain Ancestors naturally did not refute them, and agreed one by one.

At the same time, there was also a rumor about the Holy Monument within the Battle Gate, and some of the Supreme Domain Ancestors on the Supreme Strength List had approached the Fire Emblem War Ancestor and asked for a Holy Monument place.

And the Fire Emblem War Ancestor led these people to Ye Tian and asked them to ask Ye Tian directly.

this day.

A Supreme Domain Ancestor has come to find Ye Tian.

"Hello Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor, I am the 58th Wulong Domain Ancestor on the Battle Gate Supreme List, I want to buy a Holy Monument place, I don't know if it's possible?"

The Ancestor of the Wulong Domain said expectantly.

"It's okay to do that!"

Ye Tian said.

Immediately, he made some requests, including two holy relics, a bunch of resources, and even a lot of domain inheritance.

It can be said that the things he asked for were not available to ordinary Supreme Domain Ancestors at all, and even the top Supreme Domain Ancestors were difficult to come up with.

Even if the invincible domain ancestor on the supreme list can take it, his net worth will shrink a lot.

After hearing this, the Wulong Domain Ancestor was very hesitant, but this was an opportunity.

And the number of places in the holy monument is limited, once he hesitates for a few days, maybe the number of places will be gone.

"Okay, I promise!"

Wulong Domain Ancestor hurriedly said.

Immediately, the two signed an agreement, which can be regarded as a preliminary deal.

In the following days, an invincible domain ancestor on the top list of the strongest people all approached Ye Tian, and Ye Tian agreed one by one.

But when the quota reaches fifty, he will no longer sell them.

First of all, he had already obtained enough resources, and since the Terrans also needed the Holy Monument slots, it was impossible for him to sell all the slots.

After the matter was settled, the Invincible Domain Ancestors of the Battle Gate began to go to the Xuanxu Saint Realm with this group of Supreme Domain Ancestors who had obtained the Holy Monument quota.

They didn't use a treasure like the Ten Thousand Sky Star Leaves to rush here, after all, the time was still very early, and there was no need to waste the treasure.

So, they flew slowly like this, and they were all very strong and flew relatively fast.

Tens of thousands of years later, these domain ancestors arrived at the Daoshan Realm one after another and entered the Xuanxu Saint Realm.

And Ye Tian's body met with these domain ancestors for the first time.

This time, the Battle Gate sent a total of eight Invincible Domain Ancestors, these eight Invincible Domain Ancestors are not weak, they are all one of the thirty-six War Emperors, and among them, there is also the Invincible Domain Ancestor that Ye Tian has seen before-Ancient Sea Ancestor.

Except for the Ancient Sea Domain, the strength of the other eight Invincible Domain Ancestors was not weak at all.

However, they all restrained their breath, and Ye Tian couldn't tell which level they were in.

They are all two-step invincible domain ancestors, and maybe they are all one-step invincible domain ancestors.

In short, with these Invincible Domain Ancestors in charge, unless other Holy Gates sent a large number of one- or two-step Invincible Domain Ancestors, there was no way to threaten Ye Tian at all.
